name: Bryan Drew
bio: Bryan Drew is the sole Republican candidate in the 2026 primary for Illinois Comptroller, the statewide office that manages state finances, pays state bills, and reports on Illinois' fiscal condition. Incumbent Democratic Comptroller Susana Mendoza is not seeking re-election, creating an open seat. Drew faces no primary opposition on the Republican side and will be the Republican nominee heading into the November general election against one of four Democratic primary candidates (Margaret Croke, Stephanie Kifowit, Holly Kim, or Karina Villa). Campaign finance data and a full biographical profile were not available in public filings as of March 14, 2026.
prior_office: Unknown — not confirmed in available sources

jacket.note: No ILSBE or FEC finance data found in available sources. Ballotpedia lists Drew as the sole Republican candidate but provides no finance data.
